examples: extol the virtues of one's children
The children were thrilled at the prospect of going to the movies
He was inebriated by his phenomenal success

meanings.definition: raise in rank, character, or status
examples: exalted the humble shoemaker to the rank of King's adviser

meanings.definition: of high moral or intellectual value; elevated in nature or style; ; - Oliver Franks
examples: argue in terms of high-flown ideals
